summary: Everyone's becoming an IC again. >> It used to be, okay, I don't have the skills to do 10 different jobs, but now with AI allows me to do many of those jobs myself.
We need to dissolve the boundaries of these traditional roles and call ourselves builders.
core_points: Kind: captions Language: en We're seeing this kind of flattening of orgs.
Everyone's becoming an IC again. >> It used to be, okay, I don't have the skills to do 10 different jobs…
